## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Is it related to a limitation you've run into?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, or anything else that would help.
